code: import axios from'axios';const api=axios.create({baseURL:process.env.REACT_APP_API_URL||'http://localhost:5000/api'});api.interceptors.request.use(config=>{const token=localStorage.getItem('token');const hasValidToken=token&&token!=='null'&&token!=='undefined';if(hasValidToken){config.headers.Authorization=`Bearer ${token}`;}else{delete config.headers.Authorization;}return config;});export default api;
